title: Fix UI blur and improve WhatsApp-like usability

requirements.text: Remove or reduce any CSS blur effects that are making the interface difficult to read or interact with

quotes: THERE IS SOME BLUR & NOT ABLE TOUSE LIKE WHATSAPP

acceptanceCriteria: All text and UI elements are sharp and clearly readable
No visual blur effects obstruct user interaction
Interface renders crisply on standard displays

requirements.text: Improve overall interface responsiveness and interaction patterns to match WhatsApp-style usability expectations
acceptanceCriteria: Message sending is instant and responsive
Chat interactions feel smooth and natural
Touch/click targets are appropriately sized and responsive

requirements.text: Review and optimize ChatView background styling to ensure it does not interfere with content readability
acceptanceCriteria: Background images or patterns do not reduce text contrast
Message bubbles are clearly distinguishable from the background
All UI controls remain visible and accessible

constraints: Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Maintain the existing warm, family-friendly visual theme while fixing blur issues
Preserve all existing messaging and authentication functionality
